pages.title: LLMs.txt for Greip (greip.io) - Fraud Prevention/Detection Service
pages.content:
# LLMs.txt for Greip (greip.io) - Fraud Prevention/Detection Service
# Generated: 2026-07-02 11:20:54

> Greip is a comprehensive fraud prevention and detection platform designed to help businesses protect themselves from fraudulent activities and cyber threats. Leveraging advanced data analysis, machine learning, and real-time intelligence, Greip offers a suite of tools and APIs for IP geolocation, payment fraud analysis, BIN and IBAN validation, content moderation, VPN/proxy detection, and more. With multilingual support and a focus on accuracy, Greip empowers organizations to reduce risk, enhance security, and ensure compliance across digital transactions and user interactions.

Important notes:
- Documentation of Greip's services and features can be found at [Greip Documentation](https://docs.greip.io/llms.txt).
- For support, visit [Greip Support](https://greip.io/contact) or refer to the [FAQ](https://greip.io/faq) section.

# greip.io
# greip.io\ar

## Pricing Table
| Plan | Cost | Request |
|------|------|---------|
| Free | $0.00 per month / $0.00 per year | 2000 requests per month |
| Standard| $29.00 per month / $290.00 per year | 170000 requests per month |
| Premium | $89.00 per month / $890.00 per year | 400000 requests per month |
| Pay as you go | Usage based (refer to the [PAYG Calculator](https://greip.io/PAYG-Calculator) for more details) | Unlimited requests per month |

## Services
- [Payment Fraud Analysis] (https://greip.io/services/payment-fraud-analysis): Analyze and detect fraudulent payment activities in real time to protect your business.
- [Card Issuer Verification] (https://greip.io/services/card-issuer-verification): Instantly verify card issuers to reduce fraud and ensure transaction authenticity.
- [IBAN Validation & Insights] (https://greip.io/services/iban-validation-and-insights): Validate IBAN numbers and access detailed bank and country information.
- [Content Moderation] (https://greip.io/services/content-moderation): Automatically detect and filter inappropriate or harmful content in user submissions.
- [VPN & Proxy Detection] (https://greip.io/services/vpn-proxy-detection): Identify users hiding behind VPNs or proxies to prevent fraudulent activities.
- [IP Location Intelligence] (https://greip.io/services/ip-location-intellegence): Get accurate geolocation data and insights for any IP address.
- [Network Intelligence (ASN)] (https://greip.io/services/network-intellegence-asn): Retrieve detailed Autonomous System Number (ASN) and network information.
- [Country Intelligence] (https://greip.io/services/country-intellegence): Access comprehensive data and risk insights for any country.
- [Data Scoring & Validation] (https://greip.io/services/data-scoring-and-validation): Score and validate user data to assess risk and ensure accuracy.
- [كشف الاحتيال في الدفع] (https://greip.io/ar/services/payment-fraud-analysis): تحليل وكشف عمليات الاحتيال في الدفع لحماية أعمالك.
- [التحقق من مُصدري بطاقات الدفع] (https://greip.io/ar/services/card-issuer-verification): التحقق الفوري من مُصدري البطاقات للحد من الاحتيال وضمان صحة المعاملات.
- [التحقق من IBAN والرؤى] (https://greip.io/ar/services/iban-validation-and-insights): التحقق من صحة أرقام IBAN والحصول على معلومات مفصلة عن البنك والدولة.
- [مراقبة المحتوى] (https://greip.io/ar/services/content-moderation): اكتشاف وتصفية المحتوى غير اللائق أو الضار تلقائيًا في المشاركات.
- [كشف VPN والبروكسي] (https://greip.io/ar/services/vpn-proxy-detection): تحديد المستخدمين الذين يستخدمون VPN أو البروكسي لمنع الأنشطة الاحتيالية.
- [تحليل معلومات موقع عناوين IP] (https://greip.io/ar/services/ip-location-intellegence): الحصول على بيانات دقيقة حول الموقع الجغرافي لأي عنوان IP.
- [تحليل الشبكة (ASN)] (https://greip.io/ar/services/network-intellegence-asn): استرجاع معلومات مفصلة حول رقم النظام المستقل (ASN) والشبكة.
- [تحليل الدولة] (https://greip.io/ar/services/country-intellegence): الوصول إلى بيانات شاملة وتحليلات المخاطر لأي دولة.
- [التحقق من بيانات المستخدمين وتقييم مخاطرها] (https://greip.io/ar/services/data-scoring-and-validation): تقييم صحة بيانات المستخدمين وتقدير المخاطر بدقة.

## Case studies
- [All Greip Case Studies] (https://greip.io/case-studies/all): Explore all case studies showcasing Greip's fraud prevention solutions in action.
- [DashU Case Study] (https://greip.io/case-studies/dashu): Learn how DashU leveraged Greip to reduce fraud and improve transaction security.
- [Pandaify Case Study] (https://greip.io/case-studies/pandaify): Discover how Pandaify used Greip to enhance fraud detection and protect their platform.
- [جميع دراسات الحالة] (https://greip.io/ar/case-studies/all): استكشف جميع دراسات الحالة التي تعرض حلول Greip لمنع الاحتيال.
- [دراسة حالة DashU] (https://greip.io/ar/case-studies/dashu): تعرف على كيفية استفادة DashU من Greip لتقليل الاحتيال وتحسين أمان المعاملات.
- [دراسة حالة Pandaify] (https://greip.io/ar/case-studies/pandaify): اكتشف كيف استخدمت Pandaify Greip لتعزيز كشف الاحتيال وحماية منصتها.

## Comparisons
- [Greip vs Castle.io] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-castle.io): Compare Greip's fraud prevention features with Castle.io.
- [Greip vs IPinfo] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-ipinfo): See how Greip's IP intelligence stacks up against IPinfo.
- [Greip vs IPQS] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-ipqs): Detailed comparison of Greip and IPQS for fraud detection and scoring.
- [Greip vs SEON.io] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-seon.io): Evaluate Greip versus SEON.io for anti-fraud and risk analysis.
- [Greip vs IP Stack] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-ip-stack): Review the differences between Greip and IP Stack for IP geolocation.
- [Greip vs IP2Location] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-ip2location): Compare Greip's IP data and fraud detection with IP2Location.
- [Greip vs BIN-Check.io] (https://greip.io/comparisons/greip-vs-bin-check.io): Greip versus BIN-Check.io for BIN lookup and fraud prevention.

pages.title: docs.greip.io
pages.content: Introduction - Greip API Documentation Documentation Index Fetch the complete documentation index at: /llms.txt Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Skip to main content 🚀 Greip's API achieved 100% uptime for the last 90 days, learn more . Greip API Documentation home page Search... ⌘ K Community Dashboard Dashboard Search... Navigation Get Started Introduction Documentation API Reference Knowledge Base Integration Guide Packages & Libraries Integrations Changelog Server Status Articles Dictionary FAQ Get Started Introduction API Policy Authentication HTTPS Support Error Codes Usage Limits Docs MCP Server API Features Customize Response Response Format Localization Development Environment User Identifier JSONP Callback VPN/Proxy Detection On this page Quick Start Key Sections in This Documentation Get Started Introduction OpenAI Open in ChatGPT Welcome to Greip documentation OpenAI Open in ChatGPT Greip’s Fraud Prevention API is a powerful tool that can help you detect and prevent various types of fraud in your website or app. By using this API, you can gain more insight into your users and provide a better user experience and more importantly protecting your business from financial losses that rising each year due to fraudulent activities. In this documentation, we’ll show you how to use the API by highlighting its methods, options, and other features. Our API also offers a “development environment,” which allows you to test and integrate the API with your website or app without affecting your subscription. Please note that while the development environment simulates live mode exactly, it will retrieve random (fake) information. This feature can be helpful for developers who want to test the API’s functionality before going live. ​ Quick Start The Greip Fraud Prevention API can be used for both personal and commercial use cases, and you’ll receive the same level of accuracy, speed, and security regardless of whether you have a paid plan or not. To get started, you’ll need to create account and obtain a unique API key. Once you have your key, you can use it to access the API’s functions and start detecting and preventing fraud in your website or app. ​ Key Sections in This Documentation API Reference Learn how to use the Greip Fraud Prevention API to detect and prevent fraud Packages & Libraries Find the right package or library for your programming language Knowledge Base Find helpful resources and guides on using Greip’s dashboard Integrations Integrate Greip with other services and platforms Integration Guide A step by step guide to integrate Greip API with your website or app based on your use case Was this page helpful? Yes No API Policy ⌘ I linkedin github website x slack Powered by This documentation is built and hosted on Mintlify, a developer documentation platform
